name: inboxflow-agent
description: Autonomous email marketing flow-testing agent using Gmail seed inboxes and Gemini

scripts.dev:client:wait: wait-on -t 30000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm --prefix client run dev
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
